NOTICE OF HEARING ON DEFTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY JUDICIAL PROCEEDINGS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT PICTURE PEOPLE INC. GAMBLE, STEVE HEARING SET FOR JUN-07-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT, THE PICTURE PEOPLE INC.'S AND STEVE GAMBLE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY JUDICIAL PROCEEDINGS, SUBMITTED ON JUNE 7, 2005 IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-21-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
